_meta.author: waleedkibhen
_meta.title: Glow Button
_meta.description: A clean glowing button that pops off the screen. On hover, a subtle glare slides across the surface, giving it that shiny, futuristic vibe. It also reacts with a soft press animation when clicked, making it feel alive. Works in both light and dark mode without extra setup. Perfect for flashy CTAs like Generate, Start, or Launch.
